channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] not much happened today
item.description: [AINews] not much happened today

item.title: [Latent Space] 5 Trends That Defined AI Engineering at World’s Fair 2026
item.description: 5 Trends That Defined AI Engineering at World’s Fair 2026

item.title: [Hacker News] Financing the AI boom: from cash flows to debt [pdf]
item.description: Financing the AI boom: from cash flows to debt [pdf]

item.title: [Hacker News] Bonsai 27B (1-bit LLM): The First 27B-Class Model to Run on a Phone
item.description: Bonsai 27B (1-bit LLM): The First 27B-Class Model to Run on a Phone

item.title: [Hacker News] Are we offloading too much of our thinking to AI?
item.description: Are we offloading too much of our thinking to AI?

item.title: [Anthropic] Introducing Claude for Teachers
item.description: Introducing Claude for Teachers

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
item.description: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research

item.title: [Anthropic] How Canada uses Claude
item.description: How Canada uses Claude

item.title: [Hacker News] Proof of care in the age of AI
item.description: Proof of care in the age of AI

item.title: [Hacker News] How to stop Claude from saying load-bearing
item.description: How to stop Claude from saying load-bearing

item.title: [Hacker News] Codex scraped the ICM website and discovered 2026 Fields Medal winner list
item.description: Codex scraped the ICM website and discovered 2026 Fields Medal winner list

item.title: [Hacker News] Codex starts encrypting sub-agent prompts
item.description: Codex starts encrypting sub-agent prompts

item.title: [GitHub Trending] AIEraDev/Clypra — A modern video editor built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript. Focus on building free capabilities of premium capcut functionalities
item.description: Clypra is an open-source video editor built with Tauri and React that replicates CapCut's premium features as free capabilities.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/HenryNdubuaku — Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer
item.description: Trending GitHub repository providing resources for developing AI/ML research engineering expertise.

item.title: [OpenAI] How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
item.description: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era

item.title: [Hacker News] Demis Hassabis has a plan to harness AI safely
item.description: Demis Hassabis has a plan to harness AI safely

item.title: [Hacker News] Indian scientists produce most detailed 3D atlas of the human brainstem
item.description: Indian scientists produce most detailed 3D atlas of the human brainstem

item.title: [Hacker News] Australian energy retailers must provide three hours of free daytime electricity
item.description: Australian energy retailers must provide three hours of free daytime electricity

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series
item.description: CLIR-Bench introduces a benchmark of 6,600 clinical QA instances for evaluating multimodal question answering over irregular, sparse time series data from ICU records.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Index SLM Technical Report
item.description: Bilibili releases Index-1.9B, open small language models with 1.9B parameters achieving competitive performance on standard benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation
item.description: RouteRec framework shows item-level aggregation of multiple recommender agents outperforms request-level selection, achieving HR@10=0.295 with gated all-agent approach.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Global Merger-Arbitrage Forecasting with Language Models
item.description: Finetuned language model predicts M&A deal outcomes from long-context technical documents, reducing error to 24% below market-implied probabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences
item.description: Study benchmarks LLM-generated clinical trial summaries, identifying unsupported claims as primary failure and showing knowledge-graph augmentation improves faithfulness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation
item.description: Researchers optimize on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation by reducing vocabulary from 151k to 64k tokens, achieving 59.2% wins against Google Translate and 1.63x speedup.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Silent Failures in Quantized LLM Reasoning: A Taxonomy-Based Analysis of Hollow Convergence and Failure Mode Shifts
item.description: Quantization preserves LLM task accuracy while silently shifting reasoning quality in ways standard evaluations cannot detect.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Robust, Scalable Detection of Text Containment in Large Web-Crawled Corpora
item.description: FindMyText, an open-source tool, detects text containment in large corpora using fingerprint sequences, outperforming alternatives for identifying copyright violations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Efficiently Adapting Spoken Language Models for the Singaporean Context
item.description: A 5B spoken language model adapted to Singapore's official languages using LoRA fine-tuning and multilingual QA dataset matches performance of 7x larger models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cost of Reasoning in non-English Languages: A Case Study on Japanese
item.description: Researchers trained a Japanese-reasoning language model that performs comparably to English-reasoning baselines but underperforms on Japanese cultural benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Instruction Set and Language for Hypergraphs
item.description: IsalHG encodes finite hypergraphs as strings using a compact instruction alphabet, with a canonical variant for hypergraph isomorphism checking.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Equal Accuracy, Unequal Evidence: Search APIs as Decision Surfaces for Tool-Using Agents
item.description: Search API providers achieve similar answer accuracy but differ significantly in how their snippets and URL rankings influence agent decision-making.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Consensus vs. Dissent: Dynamic LLM Modeling of Subjective Preferences in Group Recommenders
item.description: Fine-tuned LLMs select group recommendation strategies based on predicted human preferences for fairness and consensus.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PTEI: Integrating Personality Traits to Enhance Emotional Intelligence in Large Language Models
item.description: PTEI framework integrates MBTI and OCEAN personality traits into LLM prompts to improve emotional intelligence reasoning and benchmark performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] One mechanism for many mental spaces: a shared router over a value slot in language models
item.description: Language models implement mental spaces through a shared router-slot mechanism that generalizes across counterfactual, belief, fictional, and temporal contexts, confirming Fauconnier's theory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Which Languages Transfer Best to Warlpiri? A Similarity-Based Study for Low-Resource ASR
item.description: Study identifies acoustic similarity as strongest predictor for cross-lingual ASR transfer to low-resource Australian Aboriginal language Warlpiri.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Language Re-generation: An investigation into information locality effects on reconstruction
item.description: GPT-2 models trained on impossible languages recover natural English by restructuring text toward shorter dependencies, revealing architectural biases toward information locality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PolyInterview: An LLM-based Platform for Immersive Mock Interview Practice with Comprehensive Multimodal Assessment
item.description: PolyInterview is an LLM-based platform that generates job-specific interview questions and assesses responses using multimodal evaluation of content and behavior.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Polarization Detection: A Hybrid Approach with AfroXLMR-Social and DeBERTa for Low- and High-Resource Settings
item.description: Hybrid model system using DeBERTa and AfroXLMR-Social with LoRA and data augmentation detects polarization in English and Hausa.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Neutralizing Structural Inequality in the Nigerian FinTech Sector
item.description: Human-AI triage system for Nigerian FinTech fraud detection reduces regional performance gap from 19.43 to 2.88 percentage points.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CAFE: A Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation Framework
item.description: CAFE applies factorial experimental design to evaluate compound AI systems and determine which components most impact answer quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structured Thoughts For Improved Reasoning And Context Pruning
item.description: Structured Thoughts organizes LLM reasoning into scratch work and conclusions, achieving 8.08% performance gains and 85% memory savings through context pruning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Stepwise Questioning Expert-Editor Multi-Agent Framework for Long-Document Summarization
item.description: Multi-agent framework with expert-editor agents improves LLM-based long-document summarization through stepwise questioning and targeted revision guidance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Enjoy Your Talk: A Human-Centered Benchmark for Multi-Turn Dialogue with Decoupled User Simulation, Target Modeling, and Judging
item.description: EYT-Bench, a new benchmark, evaluates LLMs on multi-turn conversations using decoupled user simulation, target modeling, and independent judging.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models Using Diversion Decoding
item.description: A new diversion decoding method improves hallucination detection in LLMs with lower computational complexity than existing approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Reasoning Hurts Legal Drafting: The Verbalization Bottleneck in Patent Claim Generation
item.description: Implicit reasoning outperforms explicit Chain-of-Thought in LLM-based patent claim generation due to verbalization bottleneck effects.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Articulate Intuition or Genuine Analysis? Benchmarking Epistemic Reliability in LLM-as-a-Judge Peer Reviews
item.description: Study finds LLM and human judges assess peer review quality differently, introducing Kahneman4Review benchmark to show misalignment between analytical form and epistemic function.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp
item.description: UNIBROWSE framework generates training data for multimodal web agents using three information patterns, achieving 54.4% benchmark accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Demographic Prompting at Scale: When More Attributes Hurt LLM--Human Agreement
item.description: LLM-human alignment peaks with one to three demographic prompt attributes but degrades when all attributes are included.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing without arity actions
item.description: Constituency parser eliminates arity actions by deriving them from delimiter-bounded stack configurations, achieving competitive performance with significantly smaller action inventories.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Knowledge Graphs Meet Graph Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Survey
item.description: Survey proposes taxonomy framework for applying Graph Neural Networks across knowledge graph construction, embedding, reasoning, and applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: Every Ground Truth is a Human Construction, not an Objective Truth
item.description: Ground truth datasets are human constructions shaped by context and choices, requiring transparency about their limits and intended use.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AuditWeave: A Tamper-Evident, Auditor-Navigable Evidence Layer for AI-Assisted and Data-Transformation Workflows
item.description: AuditWeave records AI-assisted workflow steps in tamper-evident, hash-chained ledgers that detect modifications in regulated industries.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Ablation, Statistical Inference, and Validation for KV-Cache Compression
item.description: Study compares KV-cache compression methods, finding eigenbasis approaches fail on heavy-tailed data but succeed in structured regimes with adaptive semantic dimensions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SciML in the Wild: A Diagnostic Study of When Structural Priors Help and When They Hurt
item.description: Structural priors in scientific machine learning can degrade forecasting when misaligned with underlying dynamics; less-constrained models often outperform more-constrained ones.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MawForge: Memory-Bounded Expert Materialization for Local Mixture-of-Experts Inference
item.description: MawForge enables local Mixture-of-Experts inference on memory-constrained machines by materializing expert tensors on-demand while keeping common tensors resident.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Prioritizing Search Space Regions in the Low Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem
item.description: Researchers improve solutions to the low autocorrelation binary sequences problem using Thompson sampling and GPU-accelerated parallel search methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What Context Does a Coding Agent Actually Need to Act?
item.description: Agents need only target code to edit; natural language summaries and surrounding files add little value; compressed context saves tokens.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reference-Based Distillation Detection in LLMs
item.description: Researchers develop a reference-based method using membership inference to detect model distillation and identify teacher models with near-perfect accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Depth-Entropy Guided Sampling for Training-Free LLM Reasoning
item.description: Training-free sampling method guided by entropy patterns in transformer layers achieves state-of-the-art reasoning performance across benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Low-Rank Attention Residuals
item.description: Proposed Low-Rank Attention Residuals decouple routing from representation by using low-dimensional keys with full-dimensional values in large language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FedCausal-Dyn: A Causal-Dynamic Paradigm for Federated Learning under Dynamic Feature Drift
item.description: FedCausal-Dyn framework addresses dynamic feature drift in federated learning through causal feature separation and reliable prototype aggregation.
